title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Freshworks Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Freshworks Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
